reviews.name: accounts/100486096577551952970/locations/14073247821268226998/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2xCU00xa3hOa2cxVFdjMVMyZDJWRkJvTUU5elFVRRAB

reviews.comment: Coffee Island truly stands out because of its team. The staff has excellent knowledge of coffee, from bean origins to flavour profiles, and they explain everything with genuine passion. Every recommendation feels thoughtful and personalised. On top of that, their hospitality is exceptional — warm, attentive, and professional, making the whole experience comfortable and memorable. You don’t just get great coffee here, you get people who truly understand and respect it ☕🏝️

reviewReply.comment: We’re truly glad you felt the passion, knowledge, and hospitality behind every cup. Feedback like this means a lot to our team, and we look forward to welcoming you again for many more memorable coffee moments.

reviews.comment: The items shown on the menu are not what they provide. When questioned, they make excuses saying it is a different product. Worst experience.

reviewReply.comment: Thank you for sharing this, Akash. We understand your concern around the difference between what was displayed on the menu and what was served, and how the explanation provided added to the frustration. This feedback has been taken seriously and shared with the team for review, especially around menu clarity and communication at the café. We appreciate you flagging this and helping us identify gaps that need closer attention.
